creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Every argument for USES=tar is the actual extension used...
USES=tar:xz/lzma/tgz/tbz/Z

except for one...
USES=tar:bzip2

Can we please add support for USES=tar:bz2? I know that USES=tar:bzip2 works just fine but it's inconsistent and is one more "gotcha" for porters to remember.
